mapper.insert: /* termsSendMgmtMapper.insertTermsSendTrgt */ INSERT INTO CMN_TERMS_SEND_MST ( SEQ_NUM , TRGT_YM , TYPE_CD , CONTRACT_NUM , MOBILE_NO , NAME , EMAIL , SUB_STAT , OPEN_DT , TMNT_DT , RESULT_YN , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM , RVISN_ID , RVISN_DTTM) SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYMM')||SQ_MAIL_TERM_SEND.NEXTVAL , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') AS TRGT_YM , TYPE_CD , CONTRCT_NUM , CTN , NAME , EMAIL , SUB_STATUS , OPEN_DT , TMNT_DT , 'N' AS RESULT_YN , 'BATCH' AS REGST_ID , SYSDATE AS REGST_DTTM , 'BATCH' AS RVISN_ID , SYSDATE AS RVISN_DTTM FROM ( SELECT 'WEB' AS TYPE_CD , B.SVC_CNTR_NO AS CONTRCT_NUM , B.CNTR_MOBILE_NO AS CTN , A.NAME , A.EMAIL , C.SUB_STATUS , C.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE AS OPEN_DT , DECODE(C.SUB_STATUS, 'C' , SUBSTR(C.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1 , 8), '') AS TMNT_DT FROM MCP_USER@DL_MCP A , MCP_USER_CNTR_MNG@DL_MCP B , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO C WHERE TO_CHAR(A.SYS_RDATE,'MM') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND TO_CHAR(A.SYS_RDATE,'YYYY') != TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY') AND REVOCATION_DATE IS NULL AND A.USERID = B.USERID(+) AND A.STATUS != '3' AND B.SVC_CNTR_NO = C.CONTRACT_NUM (+) UNION ALL SELECT 'REQ' AS CD , A.CONTRACT_NUM , C.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS CTN , B.CSTMR_NAME , B.CSTMR_MAIL , C.SUB_STATUS , C.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE AS OPEN_DT , DECODE(C.SUB_STATUS, 'C' , SUBSTR(C.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1 , 8), '') AS TMNT_DT FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP A , MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR@DL_MCP B , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO C WHERE TO_CHAR(A.REQ_IN_DAY,'MM') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND TO_CHAR(A.REQ_IN_DAY,'YYYY') != TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY') AND A.REQUEST_KEY = B.REQUEST_KEY AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = C.CONTRACT_NUM )
